title: Xtra Creamy Slovakian Pinto Bean Casserole
description: A buttery and creamy Slovakian dish featuring pinto beans, perfect for a crowd, with a smoky flavor from the addition of smoked paprika.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, combine the soaked and drained pinto beans, sauteed onion and garlic, smoked paprika, sour cream, and chicken broth.
Stir until the mixture is well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with shredded cheddar.
Bake for 30 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
